name: drtroyskillerburgers
description: Installable bilingual recipe PWA for Dr. Troy's Killer Burger Patties.

scripts.build: node scripts/generate-assets.mjs && node scripts/clean-dist.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/copy-static.mjs
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run build && node scripts/validate-calculations.mjs
